name: Super Tilt Bro. (NES homebrew)
_source: SOURCE-DERIVED 2026-06-09 — all addresses extracted directly from the GPL source, game/mem_labels.asm + game/constants.asm (github.com/sgadrat/super-tilt-bro master). NCI pipeline LIVE-VERIFIED: ROM at /userdata/roms/nes/Super_Tilt_Bro_(E).nes, RetroArch NCI UDP :55355 responded correctly on title screen (global_game_state=0x01 confirmed). In-game field values (stocks, positions, state) NOT yet live-verified against rendered display — blocked by menu navigation (dev controller routes to P2, title/mode-selection needs P1 input to advance; see #117 notes). SOURCE values are authoritative.
notes: Smash-Bros-style 2-player NES homebrew. Coordinate space: game uses 16-bit fixed-point for physics (player_a_x + player_a_x_low = pixel + subpixel), but player_a_x ($04) alone is the integer pixel position — use that for AI. player_a_x_screen / player_a_y_screen ($0e/$10) are screen-scroll indices (0 = on-screen). Damage is a percentage (0-999%+ in theory, displayed 0-999). Stocks start at config_initial_stocks (default 4, MAX_STOCKS=4 in constants). Player A = left/P1 controller ($d0), Player B = right/P2 controller ($d1). Player number encoding: 0 = Player A, 1 = Player B (X-register indexing into interleaved arrays). game_winner ($05db) is set to 0 (Player A won) or 1 (Player B won) when a player's stocks hit 0; only valid when global_game_state == GAME_STATE_GAMEOVER ($02).

fields.name: global_game_state
fields.note: 0x00=INGAME 0x01=TITLE 0x02=GAMEOVER 0x05=STAGE_SELECTION 0x06=CHARACTER_SELECTION 0x07=MODE_SELECTION

fields.name: game_winner
fields.note: Set to 0 (Player A wins) or 1 (Player B wins) when game ends. Only valid when global_game_state==0x02 (GAMEOVER).

fields.name: player_a_state
fields.note: Player A (P1/left) character state. 0x00=THROWN 0x01=RESPAWN 0x02=INNEXISTANT 0x03=SPAWN 0x04=OWNED 0x05=STANDING 0x06=RUNNING 0x07+=character custom states

fields.name: player_b_state
fields.note: Player B (P2/right) character state. Same enum as player_a_state.

fields.name: player_a_x
fields.note: Player A integer X pixel position (horizontal). Full precision = player_a_x + player_a_x_low ($4a) as fixed-point.

fields.name: player_b_x
fields.note: Player B integer X pixel position.

fields.name: player_a_y
fields.note: Player A integer Y pixel position (vertical, increases downward). Full precision = player_a_y + player_a_y_low ($4c).

fields.name: player_b_y
fields.note: Player B integer Y pixel position.

fields.name: player_a_x_screen
fields.note: Player A scroll-screen X offset. 0 = player is on the main screen. Non-zero = off the visible stage (dying/blasted off).

fields.name: player_a_y_screen
fields.note: Player A scroll-screen Y offset. 0 = on main screen.

fields.name: player_a_hitstun
fields.note: Player A hitstun frames remaining. >0 = currently in hitstun (cannot act).

fields.name: player_a_damages
fields.note: Player A damage percentage (0-255+; displayed as %). Higher = easier to KO.

fields.name: player_a_stocks
fields.note: Player A remaining lives/stocks. Starts at config_initial_stocks (default 4). 0 = player is out (triggers GAMEOVER).

fields.name: player_a_velocity_h
fields.note: Player A horizontal velocity (signed, integer part). player_a_velocity_h_low=$50 is subpixel.

fields.name: player_a_velocity_v
fields.note: Player A vertical velocity (signed, integer part). Positive = falling.

fields.name: player_a_direction
fields.note: Player A facing direction. 0 = left (DIRECTION_LEFT), 1 = right (DIRECTION_RIGHT).

fields.name: player_a_grounded
fields.note: 0 = airborne; non-zero = platform offset from stage_data (player is on the ground).

fields.name: player_a_hitbox_enabled
fields.note: 0=hitbox off, 1=direct hitbox active, 2=custom hitbox. Non-zero = Player A is attacking.

fields.name: controller_a_btns
fields.note: P1 controller button bitmask this frame. Bit7=A, Bit6=B, Bit5=Select, Bit4=Start, Bit3=Up, Bit2=Down, Bit1=Left, Bit0=Right.

fields.name: controller_b_btns
fields.note: P2 controller button bitmask. Same bit layout as controller_a_btns.

fields.name: controller_a_last_frame_btns
fields.note: P1 previous frame buttons. Diff from controller_a_btns = newly-pressed inputs.

fields.name: screen_shake_counter
fields.note: Non-zero while screen is shaking (after a strong hit / KO). Frame counter.

fields.name: slow_down_counter
fields.note: Non-zero during hit-pause slowdown frames (game freezes briefly on strong hits).

fields.name: config_initial_stocks
fields.note: Configured starting stock count (set in CONFIG screen). Both players start with this many lives.

fields.name: config_ai_level
fields.note: Built-in AI level (0=off, non-zero=AI enabled for the NES-side CPU opponent). Separate from external AI control.
